name: Andre Smith
bio: Andre Smith is an activist and perennial candidate challenging incumbent Michael Scott Jr. in the District 2 Democratic primary. He also ran for this seat in 2022.
prior_office: No elected office held. Perennial candidate and community activist.

jacket.source: Illinois State Board of Elections (not retrieved)

career_history.role: Candidate for Cook County Commissioner District 2 (2022)
Candidate for Cook County Commissioner District 2 (2026)
